messages: %s Sorry I haven't got that exact item right now come back later.
%s You don't have that on you that I can see.
%s I don't buy those. Stop wasting my time.
%s That's too expensive for me! Do I look like a noble to you?
%s You know you can't afford that. Quit wasting my time.
%s I'll give you %d coins for that. Not a cent more!
